creator: fsbruva@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to lysfjord.daniel from comment #2)
What port(s) are you wanting to build, and have you specified the -nox11 flavor of  imagemagick as the default version in make.conf?

My builds didn't work because my make.conf ended up having errors. Sorry for the spam, tcberner!

When I corrected my make.conf to have the following:
DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= imagemagick=7-nox11
then my poudriere builds used the correct flavor of ImageMagick. No changes seem needed to Mk/Uses/magick.mk.
